result:
[[B3]]

to: nadia@example.com
cc: marketing@example.com
subject: Following up from the trade exchange

Nadia,

It's Sam from Hillside Farm; we had a stand at your trade exchange. Thank you for putting it on, and for the steer on keeping the pricing talk with the platform rather than the buyers.

The day made one thing obvious: our concierge brochure is wrong. It leads on horse riding, when a hotel guest is really buying a whole day out for the family. Mia, our marketing manager, is rebuilding it, and before we print I'd value your eye on it. You understand what the hotel desks actually use far better than we do. She'll send it through when it's ready.

Sam
